    Properties

    Name Description
    Color

    The Color
    EdgeFlag

    The Edge Flags: 1 = top, 2 = right, 4 = bottom, 8 = left, 0x10 = inside vertical, 0x20 = inside horizontal
    Invisibility

    The Invisibility: 1 = invisible, 0 = visible
